Meta.title: SEO Agent — Site Content & Meta Tag Management
Meta.description: SEO Agent helps you manage your website content and meta tags from one place — fast, bilingual, and built for search.

Hero.title: Manage your site content and meta tags in one place
Hero.subtitle: SEO Agent connects to your data and gives you a single workspace to edit content, optimize meta tags, and keep every page search-ready — in English and Russian.

Features.heading: Everything you need to stay search-ready

content.title: Content management
content.body: Edit and organize page content from a clean, centralized dashboard.

meta.title: Meta tags
meta.body: Craft titles, descriptions, and Open Graph tags optimized for every page.

bilingual.title: Bilingual by default
bilingual.body: Run your site in English and Russian without duplicating work.

Content.title: Content from Neon
Content.empty: No published pages yet. Run the schema and seed in your Neon SQL Editor.

Events.title: Event meta tags

Events.eventsSubtitle: Events catalog. Click cards to filter (multi-select), or search by ID.
Events.attractionsSubtitle: Attractions catalog. Click cards to filter (multi-select), or search by ID.
Events.noLiveMeta: No live meta in the synced data.
Events.liveHint: Live data is synced from the site periodically (about hourly), so recent admin edits may appear here with a delay.

Home.title: SEO Agent
Home.subtitle: Manage SEO meta tags for PlatinumList events and attractions — review, regenerate and track indexation.
Home.eventsTile: Browse the full events catalog. Review, regenerate and approve SEO meta tags.
Home.attractionsTile: Browse attractions. Review, regenerate and approve their SEO meta tags.
Home.categoriesTile: Browse PlatinumList event-type categories and their SEO titles and meta tags.
Home.venuesTile: Browse published PlatinumList venues and their SEO titles and meta tags.
Home.artistsTile: Browse PlatinumList artists and their SEO titles, keywords and bios.
Home.catalogAreaDesc: Browse and manage SEO meta tags across all PlatinumList content — events, attractions, categories, venues and artists.
Home.keywordsAreaDesc: Build a purchase-intent keyword list for an attraction ticketing page. Powered by DataForSEO via n8n.

KeywordResearch.title: Keyword Research
KeywordResearch.subtitle: Build one consolidated keyword list for an attraction ticketing page, geo-targeted to the demand market.
KeywordResearch.empty: No research yet. Start your first one.
KeywordResearch.formHint: Target geo is the market of DEMAND (where searchers are), not necessarily where the attraction sits.
KeywordResearch.fLocIsDemand: Physical location is the demand market
KeywordResearch.runningHint: The pipeline runs in n8n (DataForSEO + analysis). This page updates automatically.
KeywordResearch.failedHint: The research could not be dispatched or completed.
KeywordResearch.notConfigured: The n8n webhook is not wired yet, so the job could not be dispatched. Once n8n is connected, new research will run end to end.
KeywordResearch.gateBHint: Review, edit and approve. Purchase intent is prioritized over raw volume.
KeywordResearch.deleteConfirm: Delete this research? This cannot be undone.
